text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 CNN: The status of the Strait of Hormuz will remain unchanged until Iran and the United States agree on a 'common framework' for negotiations. An Iranian security source claims that, what he called excessive deamnds, from the U.S. over the critical shipping route have blocked progress toward a shared basis for talks, warning that the Strait will remain closed until the U.S. adopts a more realistic approach. They report that Tehran has made clear that without an agreed framework, even previously discussed arrangements on limited ship passage will not be implemented. They added that Iran shown their ability to reinforce restrictions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 CNN：在伊朗和美国就谈判达成“共同框架”之前，霍尔木兹海峡的现状将保持不变。一位伊朗安全消息人士称，美国对这一关键航运路线提出的所谓过分要求阻碍了达成谈判共同基础的进展，并警告称，除非美国采取更现实的态度，否则海峡将保持关闭。他们报告称，德黑兰已明确表示，如果没有达成一致的框架，即使是此前讨论过的关于有限船只通行的安排也不会实施。他们补充说，伊朗已经展示了其加强限制的能力。@wfwitness

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: US-Iran talks are set to be extended for another day tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 快讯：美伊谈判将延长一天 推文

text: OSINTtechnical US intelligence indicates that China is preparing to deliver new air defense systems to Iran within the next few weeks -CNN Intelligence reports also show that China may have already sent MANPADS to Iran during the war -NYT https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043098642542739670/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 美国情报显示，中国正准备在未来几周内向伊朗交付新的防空系统 - CNN 情报还显示，中国可能在战争期间已经向伊朗发送了便携式防空系统 (MANPADS) - 纽约时报 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043098642542739670/photo/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Iran-U.S. talks to be extended for one day — Tasnim tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 伊朗与美国谈判将延长一天 — 塔斯尼姆通讯社 推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: Iran says talks will continue with the United States 'despite disagreements' tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 快讯：伊朗表示尽管存在分歧，但与美国的谈判将继续进行 推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Fars correspondent dispatched to Islamabad: Negotiations will continue from Sunday morning.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 法尔斯通讯社记者派驻伊斯兰堡：谈判将于周日上午继续进行。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷IRIB: Another round of in-person direct negotitations has ended between U.S. and Iranian negotiators and resumed after a break to exchange texts with experts. Negotiations have been ongoing for 14 hours so far. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Tasnim: Negotiations between the U.S. and Iran in Islamabad have been extended by one day. Negotiations will resume later in the morning after both sides accepted a Pakistani proposal. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷伊朗伊斯兰共和国广播电视台 (IRIB)：美伊谈判代表之间的又一轮面对面直接谈判已经结束，在与专家交换文本后恢复。谈判目前已持续 14 小时。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 塔斯尼姆通讯社：美伊在伊斯兰堡的谈判延长了一天。在双方接受巴基斯坦的提议后，谈判将于当天晚些时候恢复。@wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: 🖌 Christ is Risen! Happy Holy Pascha! Pascha is our main symbol of hope. Light is stronger than darkness. Life is stronger than death. We believe in this — and it is precisely this that gives us strength. Today this meaning is felt with particular acuteness, especially by those who stand shoulder to shoulder with death. Somewhere on the front lines our comrades are celebrating the Paschal night far from home — and it is precisely there, in this proximity to the very edge, that prayer gains true power, hope becomes not consolation, but support, and thoughts of loved ones warm in a way no fire ever could. High-resolution artwork: 🔸 The Savior 🔸 Prayer 🔸 Light in Darkness 🔸 Of Home 🔸 Paschal Greetings 🔸 Pascha on the Front #art #holiday #Russia ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Zen 💸 Support us Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar 英文版：🖌 基督复活了！复活节快乐！复活节是我们主要的希望象征。光明强于黑暗。生命强于死亡。我们相信这一点——正是这一点赋予了我们力量。今天，这种意义被感受得尤为深刻，特别是对于那些与死亡并肩作战的人来说。在战线的某个地方，我们的同志们远离家乡庆祝复活节之夜——正是在那里，在离死亡如此之近的地方，祈祷获得了真正的力量，希望不再是安慰，而是支撑，对亲人的思念以任何火焰都无法比拟的方式温暖着心灵。高分辨率艺术作品：🔸 救世主 🔸 祈祷 🔸 黑暗中的光明 🔸 家乡 🔸 复活节问候 🔸 前线的复活节 #艺术 #节日 #俄罗斯 ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Zen 💸 支持我们 原文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷IRIB: Another round of in-person direct negotitations has ended between U.S. and Iranian negotiators and resumed after a break to exchange texts with experts. Negotiations have been ongoing for 14 hours so far. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Mehr: Negotiations between the U.S. and Iran in Islamabad have ended after 14 hours. False, apologies. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷伊朗伊斯兰共和国广播电视台 (IRIB)：美伊谈判代表之间的又一轮面对面直接谈判已经结束，在与专家交换文本后恢复。谈判目前已持续 14 小时。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 梅尔通讯社：美伊在伊斯兰堡的谈判在持续 14 小时后结束。抱歉，此消息有误。@wfwitness

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Irish Riot Police start to arrive in Galway, Ireland after more people have joined the farmers, truckers and business owners protesting fuel prices and tax. https://x.com/i/status/2043079724851728468/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 现在 - 爱尔兰防暴警察开始抵达爱尔兰戈尔韦，此前有更多人加入了抗议燃料价格和税收的农民、卡车司机和企业主的行列。https://x.com/i/status/2043079724851728468/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender In an official statement early Sunday published by Iran's state-run media broadcaster IRIB, the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy (IRGC-N) warned that any attempt by military vessels to pass through the Strait of Hormuz would be met with a “firm and forceful response,” adding that it maintains full control over the strategic strait located between the Iran and Oman. This follows reports that two warships with the U.S. Navy transited the strait earlier today in a freedom-of-navigation operation, completing their mission before withdrawing back to the Arabian Sea. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在周日早些时候由伊朗国家广播公司 IRIB 发布的一份官方声明中，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军 (IRGC-N) 警告称，任何军事船只试图通过霍尔木兹海峡的行为都将遭到“坚定而有力的回应”，并补充说，它对位于伊朗和阿曼之间的这一战略海峡保持完全控制。此前有报道称，两艘美国海军军舰今天早些时候在一次航行自由行动中通过了该海峡，在撤回阿拉伯海之前完成了任务。推文

text: Visioner 📢 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump on talks in Islamabad: "They've been meeting for many hours... We'll see what happens. Regardless, we win... Maybe they make a deal; maybe they don't. It doesn't matter. From the standpoint of America, we win." https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043090403482570967/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 📢 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普谈伊斯兰堡谈判：“他们已经会面了许多小时……我们将拭目以待。无论如何，我们赢了……也许他们会达成协议；也许不会。这无关紧要。从美国的角度来看，我们赢了。” https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043090403482570967/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel UPDATE 🔴 Significant gaps remain between the U.S. and Iranian negotiating teams. Tasnim: 3rd Round of talks between Iran and US in Islamabad has concluded - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 更新 🔴 美国和伊朗谈判团队之间仍存在重大分歧。塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗与美国在伊斯兰堡的第三轮谈判已经结束 - Open Source Intel 推文

text_zh: The Spectator Index 美伊巴谈判仍在进行中，伊斯兰堡当地时间凌晨 2 点。推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump on whether or not the Iran talks will be successful, as they continue well into the early morning hours: "Regardless what happens, we win," tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 特朗普谈及伊朗谈判是否会成功，因为谈判一直持续到清晨：“无论发生什么，我们都赢了，” 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 Fars News Agency: Trilateral talks between Iran and the United States in Islamabad continue intensively, with approximately nine hours having passed since they began. Local time is now 2:21am. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 IRIB: Another round of in-person direct negotitations has ended between U.S. and Iranian negotiators and resumed after a break to exchange texts with experts. Negotiations have been ongoing for 14 hours so far. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 法尔斯通讯社：伊朗与美国在伊斯兰堡的三方谈判正在紧张进行，自开始以来已过去约九小时。当地时间现在是凌晨 2:21。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰共和国广播电视台 (IRIB)：美伊谈判代表之间的又一轮面对面直接谈判已经结束，在与专家交换文本后恢复。谈判目前已持续 14 小时。@wfwitness

text: Reporter: Iran is not listening to your threats about reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Trump: How do you know that? Reporter: Because it’s still blocked. Trump: Why do you say that? You don’t know anything. Who are you with? Reporter: NBC News. Trump: NBC? That’s fake news.
text_zh: 记者：伊朗没有听从你关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的威胁。特朗普：你怎么知道？记者：因为它仍然被封锁。特朗普：你为什么这么说？你什么都不知道。你是哪家媒体的？记者：NBC 新闻。特朗普：NBC？那是假新闻。

text: Trump on China sending weapons to Iran: If China does that, China is going to have big problems.
text_zh: 特朗普谈中国向伊朗运送武器：如果中国这样做，中国将会有大麻烦。

text: Trump: We are in very deep negotiations with Iran. We win regardless.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们正在与伊朗进行非常深入的谈判。无论如何我们都赢了。

text: Trump: We win, regardless what happens, we win. Let’s see what happens. Maybe they will make a deal, maybe they won’t. It doesn’t matter. From the standpoint of America, we win.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们赢了，无论发生什么，我们都赢了。让我们看看会发生什么。也许他们会达成协议，也许不会。这无关紧要。从美国的角度来看，我们赢了。

text: ⚡️ 🇰🇼 The Kuwaiti police announced they foiled a plot involving the financing of terrorist organisations and threats to national security, leading to the arrest of 24 people. They accuse them of using commercial and professional fronts to launder funds, and relied on coordinated methods by air and land, distributing funds among multiple individuals to avoid detection. One of those detained had already had their citizenship revoked, while eight additional fugitives abroad were identified, including one stripped of citizenship. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇰🇼 科威特警方宣布挫败了一起涉及资助恐怖组织和威胁国家安全的阴谋，导致 24 人被捕。他们指控这些人利用商业和专业幌子洗钱，并依靠空中和陆地的协调方式，将资金分配给多名个人以逃避侦查。其中一名被拘留者此前已被剥夺公民身份，另有八名在逃人员被确认，其中包括一名被剥夺公民身份的人。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Some serious disagreements between the Iranian and American delegations in the negotiations still remain. The ball is in the American court to replace ambition with a realistic approach by overcoming the usual excesses. — Tasnim
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗和美国代表团在谈判中仍存在一些严重分歧。现在轮到美国采取行动，通过克服通常的过分要求，以现实的态度取代野心。—— 塔斯尼姆通讯社

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Another round of in-person talks between Iran and the US in Islamabad, Pakistan has ended — Tasnim. The two sides are once again exchanging texts with the presence of expert teams.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗与美国在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡的又一轮面对面谈判已经结束 —— 塔斯尼姆通讯社。双方在专家团队的陪同下再次交换文本。

text: OSINTdefender According to NewsNation’s Kellie Meyer, citing a senior White House official, as of 1:55 a.m. in Islamabad, Pakistan, the in-person trilateral U.S.-Pakistan-Iran talks were still ongoing. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043085099319623712/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据 NewsNation 的 Kellie Meyer 援引一位白宫高级官员的话称，截至伊斯兰堡当地时间凌晨 1:55，美巴伊三方面对面谈判仍在进行中。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043085099319623712/photo/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - NASA's Norm Knight, Director of Flight Operations: We are entering a new era of exploration, returning to the moon, building a sustained presence there, and preparing for missions to Mars." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043083167251239053/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 现在 - 美国国家航空航天局 (NASA) 飞行运营主管 Norm Knight：“我们正在进入一个探索的新时代，重返月球，在那里建立持续存在，并为火星任务做准备。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043083167251239053/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: Iranian state media reports 'stalemate' in talks due to 'excessive US demands' tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 快讯：伊朗官方媒体报道称，由于“美国过分要求”，谈判陷入“僵局” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Artemis II pilot Victor Glover on his safe return: "I wanted to thank God in public, and I want to thank God again, because even bigger than my challenge trying to describe what we went through, the gratitude of seeing what we saw, doing what we did, and being with who I was with, it's too big to just be in one body." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 阿耳忒弥斯 2 号飞行员 Victor Glover 在安全返回后表示：“我想公开感谢上帝，我想再次感谢上帝，因为比我试图描述我们所经历的一切的挑战更大的是，看到我们所看到的、做我们所做的、与我在一起的人在一起的感激之情，这太大了，无法用一个身体来承载。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel At least 5 more Iranian planes have landed in Islamabad. Multiple reports that additional Iranian officials have arrived. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 至少又有 5 架伊朗飞机降落在伊斯兰堡。多份报告称有更多伊朗官员抵达。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 “If China does that, China’s going to have big problems.” Trump speaking to reporters outside the White House, responding to reports that China is preparing to send man-portable air-defense systems (MANPADS) to Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials…" 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump on the Islamabad talks: "Whether we make a deal or not makes no difference to me." He claims the US is currently sweeping the strait for mines laid by "water dropper" while his Vice President is currently in Pakistan negotiating. "We're opening up the strait even though we don't use it, for other countries that are afraid, or weak, or cheap." NATO, he says, was no help. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 “如果中国这样做，中国将会有大麻烦。” 特朗普在白宫外对记者发表讲话，回应有关中国正准备向伊朗发送便携式防空系统 (MANPADS) 的报道。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体……” 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普谈伊斯兰堡谈判：“我们是否达成协议对我来说没有区别。” 他声称美国目前正在海峡扫雷，这些地雷是由“投水器”放置的，而他的副总统目前正在巴基斯坦进行谈判。“我们正在开放海峡，尽管我们不使用它，但为了其他害怕、软弱或吝啬的国家。” 他说，北约没有提供任何帮助。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Iran's Embassy in Austria to Hegseth: “ It may not win him the next war, but at least he'll show up in the right place.”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗驻奥地利大使馆致 Hegseth：“这可能无法让他赢得下一场战争，但至少他会出现在正确的地方。”

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Iranian source to CNN: — Iran says it is not in a hurry and warns that until a framework is agreed, the current restrictions remain - agreed ship numbers will not be allowed through . — Source adds: If U.S. negotiators fail to act realistically, the Strait stays closed. Iran has demonstrated its capability, and continued miscalculation will harm the U.S.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗消息人士告诉 CNN：—— 伊朗表示不急于求成，并警告称在达成框架协议之前，目前的限制措施仍然有效——商定的船只数量将不被允许通过。—— 消息人士补充说：如果美国谈判代表不能采取现实行动，海峡将保持关闭。伊朗已经展示了其能力，持续的误判将损害美国。

text: 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 “If China does that, China’s going to have big problems.” Trump speaking to reporters outside the White House, responding to reports that China is preparing to send man-portable air-defense systems (MANPADS) to Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 “如果中国这样做，中国将会有大麻烦。” 特朗普在白宫外对记者发表讲话，回应有关中国正准备向伊朗发送便携式防空系统 (MANPADS) 的报道。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 No major shift in negotiations so far — Tasnim reporter in Islamabad — Source: Talks stalled for hours due to U.S. excessive demands, while some Western media are overstating optimism to influence energy prices. — Despite early expert-level progress, no significant change yet, the Strait of Hormuz and other issues remain key points of dispute.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 谈判目前没有重大转变 —— 伊斯兰堡的塔斯尼姆通讯社记者 —— 消息来源：由于美国过分要求，谈判陷入僵局数小时，而一些西方媒体夸大了乐观情绪以影响能源价格。—— 尽管专家层面的早期进展，但目前还没有重大变化，霍尔木兹海峡和其他问题仍然是争论的焦点。

text: "The prevailing feeling currently is that Iran is winning economically and controlling the Strait of Hormuz, collecting fees from ships." Former Pentagon analyst Michael Maloof: Trump was very surprised by the level of Iranian resistance. Iran is waging asymmetric war, it cannot confront plane for plane or missile for missile, so it resorted to other methods the United States could not adapt to. Trump says "this situation must not continue," but the situation continues and he has taken no vital steps. He's looking for an exit but doesn't want to create conditions that will cause negotiators to walk out. Meanwhile, Vance is dealing with experienced Iranian negotiators like Qalibaf, who adopts hardline positions protecting his country's interests. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: “目前普遍的感觉是，伊朗在经济上获胜并控制了霍尔木兹海峡，向船只收取费用。” 前五角大楼分析师 Michael Maloof：特朗普对伊朗的抵抗程度感到非常惊讶。伊朗正在进行非对称战争，它无法进行飞机对飞机或导弹对导弹的对抗，因此它采取了美国无法适应的其他方法。特朗普说“这种情况不能继续下去”，但情况仍在继续，他没有采取任何重要步骤。他正在寻找出路，但不想创造导致谈判代表退出的条件。与此同时，万斯正在与像卡利巴夫这样经验丰富的伊朗谈判代表打交道，后者采取强硬立场保护其国家利益。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel China is preparing to send air defense systems to Iran in the coming weeks, including MANPADS routed through a third party to mask their origin, according to CNN, citing intelligence assessments. Trump warns China will face "big problems" if it sends weapons to Iran. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043071932233339065/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据 CNN 援引情报评估称，中国正准备在未来几周内向伊朗发送防空系统，包括通过第三方转运以掩盖其来源的便携式防空系统 (MANPADS)。特朗普警告称，如果中国向伊朗发送武器，将面临“大麻烦”。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043071932233339065/video/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: OSINTdefender Speaking to reporters outside the White House, U.S. President Donald J. Trump responded to reports that China is preparing to send man-portable air-defense systems (MANPADS) to Iran, saying “If China does that, China’s going to have big problems.” President Trump is set to visit China this upcoming month. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普在白宫外对记者发表讲话，回应了有关中国正准备向伊朗发送便携式防空系统 (MANPADS) 的报道，称“如果中国这样做，中国将会有大麻烦。” 特朗普总统计划于下个月访问中国。推文

text: OSINTdefender According to CNN, citing people familiar with intelligence assessments on the matter, China is preparing to send air defense systems to Iran in the coming weeks. Per the report, China is preparing to send Man-portable air-defense systems (MANPADS) through a third party to mask the origin of the weapons. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据 CNN 援引熟悉相关情报评估的人士的话称，中国正准备在未来几周内向伊朗发送防空系统。根据报道，中国正准备通过第三方发送便携式防空系统 (MANPADS)，以掩盖武器的来源。推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 “We defeated Iran but we will negotiate with them!”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 “我们击败了伊朗，但我们将与他们谈判！”

text: Reporter: Iran is not listening to your threats about reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Trump: How do you know that? Reporter: Because it’s still blocked. Trump: Why do you say that? You don’t know anything. Who are you with? Reporter: NBC News. Trump: NBC? That’s fake news.
text_zh: 记者：伊朗没有听从你关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的威胁。特朗普：你怎么知道？记者：因为它仍然被封锁。特朗普：你为什么这么说？你什么都不知道。你是哪家媒体的？记者：NBC 新闻。特朗普：NBC？那是假新闻。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸 Senior Iran’s Navy officer: — The destroyer that tried to enter the Strait of Hormuz today is an "Arleigh Burke" class, which is the most advanced American warship. — At the same time as the destroyer's movement, Trump sent a message that the strait…" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Bloomberg, quoting a regional intelligence official: Two US Navy Arleigh Burke-class destroyers attempted to pass through the Strait of Hormuz but were forced to turn back after being threatened by IRGC and a drone was launched towards the ships.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench mirror：“🇮🇷⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸 伊朗海军高级军官：—— 今天试图进入霍尔木兹海峡的驱逐舰是“阿利·伯克”级，这是最先进的美国军舰。—— 在驱逐舰移动的同时，特朗普发出了一个信息，即海峡……” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 彭博社援引一位地区情报官员的话称：两艘美国海军阿利·伯克级驱逐舰试图通过霍尔木兹海峡，但在受到伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队威胁并向这些船只发射无人机后被迫折返。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 Tasnim: A new round of trilateral talks between Iran, the United States and Pakistan has begun in Islamabad. The Iranian delegation includes parliament speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf, Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Ali Bagheri Kani. The…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Fars News Agency: Trilateral talks between Iran and the United States in Islamabad continue intensively, with approximately nine hours having passed since they began. Local time is now 2:21am. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗、美国和巴基斯坦之间的又一轮三方谈判已在伊斯兰堡开始。伊朗代表团包括议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫、外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐和阿里·巴盖里·卡尼。……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 法尔斯通讯社：伊朗与美国在伊斯兰堡的三方谈判正在紧张进行，自开始以来已过去约九小时。当地时间现在是凌晨 2:21。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Among the wreckage of the American HC-130J, locals have recovered an AN/AAQ-24 infrared countermeasure system installed on American SOF planes and helicopters. This dazzler automatically detects and emits a laser beam at incoming infrared guided missiles to confuse them and thus protect the aircraft. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 在美国 HC-130J 的残骸中，当地人回收了一套安装在美国特种作战飞机和直升机上的 AN/AAQ-24 红外对抗系统。这种炫目器会自动探测并向来袭的红外制导导弹发射激光束，以干扰它们，从而保护飞机。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ‘Last chance’ to reach a common framework — Tasnim
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 达成共同框架的“最后机会” —— 塔斯尼姆通讯社

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf met face to face and shook hands with Vice President JD Vance, a rare moment given decades of hostility. Source: NYT
text_zh: 伊朗的卡利巴夫与副总统 JD 万斯面对面握手，考虑到几十年的敌对状态，这是一个罕见的时刻。来源：纽约时报

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷U.S. President Trump on the ongoing negotiations in Islamabad: "Getting a lot of reports. They've been meeting for many hours as you probably have noticed. We'll see what happens. Look, regardless, we win. Regardless what happens, we win. We've…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on reports that China is sending weapons to Iran: Reporter: "Tell us that China is preparing to give weapons to Iran?" Trump: "Well, if China does that, China's gonna have big problems. Okay?" @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷美国总统特朗普谈及伊斯兰堡正在进行的谈判：“收到很多报告。正如你们可能注意到的，他们已经会面了许多小时。我们将拭目以待。看，无论如何，我们赢了。无论发生什么，我们都赢了。我们……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普谈及有关中国向伊朗发送武器的报道：记者：“告诉我们中国正准备给伊朗武器？” 特朗普：“嗯，如果中国这样做，中国将会有大麻烦。好吗？” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷 IRGC Navy: Any attempt by military vessels to pass through the Strait of Hormuz will be met with a harsh response Announcement No. 58, Command of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy: — The IRGC Navy fully and powerfully controls the intelligent…" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Senior Iran’s Navy officer: — The destroyer that tried to enter the Strait of Hormuz today is an "Arleigh Burke" class, which is the most advanced American warship. — At the same time as the destroyer's movement, Trump sent a message that the strait will soon be reopened, but the IRGC vessels blocked its path and after a brief confrontation, the destroyer was forced to retreat.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench mirror：“🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军：任何军事船只试图通过霍尔木兹海峡的行为都将遭到严厉回应。第 58 号公告，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军司令部：—— 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军完全且有力地控制着智能……” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗海军高级军官：—— 今天试图进入霍尔木兹海峡的驱逐舰是“阿利·伯克”级，这是最先进的美国军舰。—— 在驱逐舰移动的同时，特朗普发出了一个信息，即海峡很快就会重新开放，但伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队的船只阻挡了它的路径，在短暂的对峙后，驱逐舰被迫撤退。

text: IRGC Navy: Any attempt by military vessels to pass through the Strait of Hormuz will face a firm response. The IRGC Navy has full authority and maintains intelligent control over the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军：任何军事船只试图通过霍尔木兹海峡的行为都将面临坚决回应。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军拥有完全的权力，并对霍尔木兹海峡保持智能控制。

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Professor Marandi on Al Mayadeen from Islamabad: 🔸 Iran is fully prepared to return to Tehran without an agreement 🔸 Negotiations are to show the international community and regional peoples that Iran gave a chance for de-escalation 🔸 If the US and Trump ignore Iran's rights and the rights of Palestine, Lebanon, and the Axis of Resistance, "we will prepare ourselves for war" 🔸 One thing that surprised the Iranian side: Lebanon's PM seeking normalization talks with Israel instead of stopping attacks on Lebanon — "completely irresponsible behavior" "As we won in the war, we will return." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 马兰迪教授在伊斯兰堡接受“广场电视台”采访：🔸 伊朗已做好充分准备在没有协议的情况下返回德黑兰 🔸 谈判是为了向国际社会和地区人民表明伊朗为缓和局势提供了机会 🔸 如果美国和特朗普无视伊朗的权利以及巴勒斯坦、黎巴嫩和抵抗轴心的权利，“我们将为战争做好准备” 🔸 伊朗方面感到惊讶的一件事：黎巴嫩总理寻求与以色列进行关系正常化谈判，而不是停止对黎巴嫩的袭击 —— “完全不负责任的行为” “正如我们在战争中获胜一样，我们将回归。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
